subject: Re: Levered basket confirm
body:
remind me wed.

----- Original Message ----
From: "dkiesq@aol.com" <dkiesq@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Monday, November 27, 2006 12:43:59 PM
Subject: Fw: Levered basket confirm

Do you know which entity will invest?  WCTII or FTC?



Sent from my BlackBerry® wireless handheld  



-----Original Message-----

From: "Hersch, Gregory A [PVTC]" <gregory.a.hersch@smithbarney.com>

Date: Mon, 27 Nov 2006 10:34:58 

To:"Darren Indyke" <DKIESQ@aol.com>

Cc:<lesley@nysgllc.com>

Subject: Levered basket confirm



Darren and Lesley, 
 
Hope you guys had a wonderful Thanksgiving! 
 
Please find attached the confirm for the 3x levered basket. Darren, as I mentioned on the phone last week, we needed to put a name and account number on the confirm. If the trade is not going to be done in Mr. Wexner's personal account, but in Wexner Children's Trust or Financial Trust Company, please let me know as soon as possible so that we can give you an updated version for Jeffrey to sign. Please note that the payment date is December 18th, however a signed confirm is needed in the next day or two to ensure that capacity in the underlying managers is held. Please call me with any questions or comments. Thanks!
 
Regards, 
 
Greg <<BASKET 3 LEV -WEXNER CLEAN.pdf>> 
 
Gregory A. Hersch, FPS 
2nd Vice President/Wealth Management
